title: astragalus variabilis
intro: Astragalus variabilis, also known as Huang Qi, is a perennial plant species belonging to the legume family, native to the mountainous regions of China and other parts of Asia. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. The health benefits of Astragalus variabilis are numerous, including its ability to boost the immune system, reduce fatigue, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and cardiovascular diseases. In herbal preparations, Astragalus variabilis is often used in teas, capsules, and tinctures, and is also combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
